_comment: GitHub Copilot CLI native hooks (https://docs.github.com/copilot/reference/hooks-reference). Copied into every target-repo checkout as `.github/hooks/sandcastle-pipeline.json` (see src/capabilities.ts). This is DIFFERENT from `agents/hooks.json`: that file configures Sandcastle's own *sandbox lifecycle* hooks (e.g. `onSandboxReady` setup commands such as `dotnet restore`); this file configures Copilot CLI's *agent-lifecycle* hooks that fire during a step, such as after every tool call. Only takes effect for the `copilot` agent backend (SANDCASTLE_AGENT=copilot). Requires GITHUB_COPILOT_PROMPT_MODE_REPO_HOOKS=true to load in the CLI's non-interactive `-p` prompt mode that this pipeline uses — src/agents.ts#buildAgent sets that env var for every copilot invocation, so this file is picked up automatically.

postToolUse.bash:
input="$(cat)"
paths="$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '[.toolArgs.path, .toolArgs.file_path, .toolArgs.filePath] | map(select(. != null)) | .[]' 2>/dev/null)"
[ -z "$paths" ] && exit 0
command -v markdownlint-cli2 >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0
while IFS= read -r p; do
  case "$p" in
    *.md|*.MD|*.Md|*.mkd|*.markdown)
      markdownlint-cli2 --fix -- "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
      ;;
  esac
done <<< "$paths"
exit 0
